title: How we 3× pipeline for a Series B dev-tools company
description: Programmatic SEO + outbound automation. From 40 demos/mo to 138.
content:
The situation

A Series B dev-tools company was stuck at 40 demos/month. They had strong product-market fit but marketing-sourced pipeline was thin. Sales was relying on founder relationships.

What we did

We built a programmatic SEO system targeting 2,400 long-tail keywords in the developer tooling space, combined with an outbound motion using Clay + Apollo. Within 90 days we had the first organic citations from ChatGPT and Perplexity.

Results

After six months: 138 demos/month (up from 40), +312% marketing-sourced pipeline, $684k in closed revenue attributed to the content engine.

title: Cutting CAC by 41% before scaling spend
description: Creative engine + LP rebuild. We fixed the maths first.
content:
The situation

A D2C beverages brand was scaling spend on Meta but burning cash — CAC at $2,100, LTV at $1,800. They wanted more budget. We said: fix the maths first.

What we did

We audited 180 creative assets, rebuilt the LP from scratch around a single conversion goal, and set up server-side attribution so we could actually trust the data. Then we launched a structured creative testing cadence.

Results

CAC dropped from $2,100 to $1,240 in four months. Only then did we scale spend — 3× budget, 3.6× pipeline.
